mapper.select: SELECT p.project_title AS projectTitle, tt.type_name AS typeName, cc.default_describe AS defaultDescribe, t.priority AS priority, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_progress AS taskProgress, t.task_manager AS taskManager, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.finish_date AS finishDate FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id INNER JOIN common_code cc ON t.task_status = cc.common_id
SELECT type_id AS typeId, type_name AS typeName FROM task_types
SELECT common_id AS commonId, default_describe AS defaultDescribe FROM common_code WHERE common_code = '0E'
SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.user_name AS userName FROM members m INNER JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code WHERE m.project_id = #{pId}
SELECT task_id AS taskId, task_title AS taskTitle FROM task WHERE parent_task_id IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO task ( task_id, task_title, task_describe, task_status, priority, task_manager, start_date, finish_date, estimated_time, task_progress, parent_task_id, spent_hours_sum, created_at, project_id, user_code,type_id ) SELECT 'TSK-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDD') || '_' || TASK_DAY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{taskTitle}, #{taskDescribe, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskStatus}, #{priority}, #{taskManager, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{estimatedTime}, #{taskProgress},
(SELECT MAX(task_id) FROM task WHERE task_title = #{parentTaskTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}),0,SYSDATE,#{projectId},#{userCode}, (SELECT MAX(type_id) FROM task_types WHERE type_name = #{typeIdName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) FROM DUAL
